markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss event planning strategies and best practices for GrowthX with insights from Deepgram's experienced event coordinator.](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to smaller, more intimate dinners (18-25 people) at exclusive venues for better engagement and easier management](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Use pre-event communication to reduce no-shows and manage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Leverage tools like Airtable for event planning and management, with emphasis on timeline tracking and task assignment](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Prioritize attendee outreach and seating arrangements to maximize networking value](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Topics

### Event Types and Strategies

  - [Two main event types: third-party conferences with adjacent activations and customer dinners](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Initially focused on larger dinners (50-70 people), now pivoting to smaller, more intimate gatherings (18-25 people)](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Emphasis on choosing exclusive venues that attendees can't easily access otherwise](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [For larger networking events, aim for 200+ people](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

### Venue Recommendations

  - [High-end options: Quince, Benu, Lazy Bear, Angler SF](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Mid-range options: The Progress, Flour + Water, Sorrel, Cotogna](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Unique experiences: Mr. Jiu's (with Moon Gate Lounge), Californios (full buyout only)](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [New hotspot: The Shota (Japanese cuisine near Moscone Center)](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Logistics and Planning

  - [Use Airtable for event management and task assignment](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Create a timeline with at least 2-3 months lead time for larger events](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Develop a strategy brief to share with the team](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Use a "shot clock" system in Airtable to track task progress](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [For dinners, coordinate outreach with sales team to prioritize invitees](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Send pre-event emails 2 days before to confirm attendance and share details](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Attendee Management

  - [Create tiered invite lists: priority, short list, and long list](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)
  - [Send invitations in waves to manage limited space effectively](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Keep a record of declined invitations for future events](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Work with executives to plan seating arrangements](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### In-House Events

  - [For office happy hours, consider custom cocktails and appetizers](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Explore unique variations like wine tastings or themed experiences](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Use resources like SF Travel Association and The Knot for vendor recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shift focus to planning smaller, more exclusive dinners (18-25 people)](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Reach out to recommended venues like Quince, Flour + Water, and Mr. Jiu's](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Implement Airtable for event planning and management](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Develop a pre-event communication strategy to reduce no-shows](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Create a tiered invitation system in collaboration with the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Explore unique in-house event ideas for office happy hours](https://fathom.video/share/jRANFYxDtLy3o4TaoeDdM4Zzf5coQ9Xq?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
